tasks.subject: Task 1: /healthz + /readyz route handlers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Liveness returns 200 unconditionally; readiness returns 200 when the DB answers SELECT 1, else 503.

**Files:**
- Create: `app/healthz/route.ts`
- Create: `app/readyz/route.ts`
- Test: `tests/unit/healthz.test.ts`
- Test: `tests/unit/readyz.test.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] GET /healthz → 200 `{status:'ok'}`, no DB access
- [ ] GET /readyz → 200 `{status:'ok'}` when SELECT 1 succeeds
- [ ] GET /readyz → 503 `{status:'unavailable'}` when DB query throws
- [ ] Both export dynamic = 'force-dynamic'

**Verify:** `CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/healthz.test.ts tests/unit/readyz.test.ts` → PASS.

**Steps:** TDD — RED (routes missing); implement healthz (Response.json ok) + readyz (try prisma.$queryRaw`SELECT 1` → ok / catch → 503); mock prisma.$queryRaw reject for the 503 test; confirm prisma import path matches existing routes; tsc+lint clean.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["app/healthz/route.ts", "app/readyz/route.ts", "tests/unit/healthz.test.ts", "tests/unit/readyz.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "CI=true pnpm exec vitest run tests/unit/healthz.test.ts tests/unit/readyz.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["healthz 200 no DB", "readyz 200 on SELECT 1", "readyz 503 on DB throw", "force-dynamic"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Container healthchecks + README docs
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Docker image and compose service report health via /readyz; README documents the probes.

**Files:**
- Modify: `Dockerfile` (HEALTHCHECK)
- Modify: `docker-compose.yml` (app healthcheck)
- Modify: `README.md` (probe paths + k8s snippet)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK hits /readyz via node fetch one-liner (no curl/wget)
- [ ] compose app service has equivalent healthcheck block
- [ ] README documents /healthz + /readyz + k8s liveness/readiness/startup snippet

**Verify:** docker build + run shows container reaching healthy (or dev-server curl /healthz /readyz if Docker unavailable, noted manual).

**Steps:** add HEALTHCHECK before node server.js CMD; add compose healthcheck block; README Health checks subsection with k8s probe yaml; verify; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Dockerfile", "docker-compose.yml", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "docker build -t quorum-health-test . (or pnpm dev + curl /healthz /readyz)", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Dockerfile HEALTHCHECK on /readyz", "compose healthcheck", "README probes + k8s snippet"]}
```
